content: Move the closet duplicate star from top-left to top-right (with offset when score badge present)
Download DressApp logo and generate favicon + PWA icon set (16/32/48/180/192/512 + .ico)
Wire favicon + manifest icon entries into index.html and manifest.json
Restart frontend service to pick up public/ changes (CRA doesn't hot-reload them)
Verify all icon URLs return 200 and browser DOM picks up new link tags
